description: This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is sold by Apprentice Darius. In the Alchemy Recipes category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
name: Recipe: Flask of Chromatic Wonder

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Recipe: Flask of Chromatic Wonder Item Level 70 Requires Alchemy (375) Requires The Violet Eye - Honored Use: Teaches you how to make a Flask of Chromatic Wonder. Sell Price: 1 Flask of Chromatic Wonder Item Level 70 Requires Level 65 Use: Increases resistance to all schools of magic by 35 and all stats by 18 for 2 hrs. Counts as both a Battle and Guardian elixir. This effect persists through death. (3 Sec Cooldown) Max Stack: 5 Sell Price: 50 Requires Dreaming Glory (7), Netherbloom (3), Fel Lotus , Imbued Vial This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is sold by Apprentice Darius. In the Alchemy Recipes category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
